entity.summary: ONUS ecosystem decentralized exchange providing wallet-connected token swaps, liquidity provision, farms, pools, analytics, and permissionless liquidity services.
entity.notes: Current first-party Heraswap site and swap interface are reachable and expose Swap, Liquidity, Farm, Pool, Analytics, and wallet-connect surfaces. DefiLlama independently identifies Heraswap as a DEX on the ONUS ecosystem.

evidence.title: Heraswap official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Heraswap application exposes Swap, Liquidity, Farm, Pool, Analytics, and wallet-connect navigation.

evidence.title: Heraswap swap interface
evidence.notes: Current first-party swap page exposes ONUS and HERA token selection, wallet connection, swap routing, and links the official documentation surface.

evidence.title: Heraswap protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Heraswap as a decentralized exchange with permissionless services and products on the ONUS ecosystem and reports DEX-volume history.
